It can be a confusing, frightening and frustrating experience that can affect our lives and relationships profoundly but if we have the skills to navigate it – it can be the best time for women. Knowledge is power. I use the tools of mindfulness, self-compassion and yoga alongside dietary advice to empower women to thrive at this time of their lives.

Book Now Group Coaching N Eating for Menopause October 2025 (online) N Eating for Diverticulitis, Diverticulosis and Managing symptoms 2025 (online) N Mindfulness and Meditation for Perimenopause and Menopause (coming soon) GET IN TOUCH TO LEARN MORE Menopause Yoga Classes Menopause is a natural process but every individual experiences it differently.

During our session, we will look at health habits and needs, symptoms and any relevant medical history. From this information, we will create a personalised nutrition and lifestyle plan to help you achieve your health goals. ## Services

What is Functional & Lifestyle Medicine.

In my spare time I enjoy walking and going to the gym, music, reading and playing the piano. LEARN MORE WORK WITH ME See what option is best for you 1:1 Personalized Coaching To Help Get You Back On Track Personalised Nutrition & Lifestyle Plan. During our session we will look at health habits and needs, symptoms and any relevant medical history.

I am passionate about supporting and educating women in the area of menopause and perimenopause and I have a special interest in the area of intimate health I have recently completed a 6 month education and mentoring programme in the area of genitourinary microbiome health with Dr Moira Bradfield, I am an accredited Intimate Ecologist and a member of the Human Microbiome Guild. I am a registered member of the NTOI and continue to complete CPD courses in nutrition and wellness.

Alongside this, I have a 200 hour yoga teacher training and have continued to study completing wellness courses in stress management, teen yoga, restorative yoga and yoga for menopause. I also teach Yoga Nidra and Health & Wellness Coaching.

Contact   ‘Take Back Control of Your Health BEGIN YOUR JOURNEY OF TRANSFORMATION WITH HARMONY HEALTH My name is Lorraine Tucker, I am a Nutritional Therapist and yoga and mindfulness teacher practising in Dublin. I have previously worked in marketing and the financial services sector and took a break when I had my three children. I decided after an illness a change in career was needed so I studied for three and a half years and graduated with a Diploma in Nutritional Therapy.

A combination of inactive lifestyles and poor dietary choices, particularly in a high-stress setting, can lead to chronic health issues over time. I am deeply enthusiastic about nutrition, and I constantly seek innovative ways to inspire others to recognize how their dietary choices directly influence their health. Please give me a call and we can discuss how to work together.

Contact   Work With Me NUTRITION & LIFESTYLE COACHING Corporate Wellness As a Nutritional Therapist, Health Coach and stress management specialist, I am always delighted to be invited to speak or run pop-up clinics and workshops in companies. I offer support and fresh up to date information on diet and lifestyle and can help you take care of your employees wellness.
